title: responseSellerCommissionsID
description: Object with the category properties and the commission percentage applied to it.

categoryId.description: Marketplace's Category ID that the product belongs to, configured in the Catalog.

categoryFullPath.description: Full path to the SKU's category.

productCommissionPercentage.description: Percentage of the comission applied to the product in decimals.

freightCommissionPercentage.description: Percentage of the comission applied to the freight in decimals.
